passes.title: Boston Childrens Museum
passes.benefit_text:
This pass admits up to 4 at $5-off each.
Pickup the pass the day before or the day of the reservation date.
This pass MUST be returned to Acton Memorial Library before the library opens the day after use. It can be placed in the outside book drop if the library is closed. Overdue passes are subject to a fine of $10 per day.
source_phrases: This pass admits up to 4 at $5-off each.
Pickup the pass the day before or the day of the reservation date.

This pass MUST be returned to Acton Memorial Library before the library opens the day after use. It can be placed in the outside book drop if the library is closed. Overdue passes are subject to a fine of $10 per day.

passes.title: Concord Museum
source_phrases: This pass admits up to six (6) people to either Davis Farmland or Davis Mega Maze at the gate with a savings of $10 OFF per ticket.
This is a coupon pass and does not need to be returned.

passes.title: Davis Farmland
passes.benefit_text:
This pass admits up to three (3) people at half price.
Pickup the pass up to six (6) days in advance of the reservation date.
This pass MUST be returned to the library it was checked out from  (either Acton Memorial Library or West Acton Citizens' Library) before the library opens the day after use. It can be placed in the outside book drop if the library is closed. Overdue passes are subject to a fine of $10 per day.
This pass is provided by the Friends of the Acton Libraries.
source_phrases: This pass admits up to three (3) people at half price.
Pickup the pass up to six (6) days in advance of the reservation date.

This pass MUST be returned to the library it was checked out from  (either Acton Memorial Library or West Acton Citizens' Library) before the library opens the day after use. It can be placed in the outside book drop if the library is closed. Overdue passes are subject to a fine of $10 per day.
This pass is provided by the Friends of the Acton Libraries.

passes.title: The Discovery Museums
passes.benefit_text: This pass offers a 50% discount admission for up to two (2) adults and two (2) children in one vehicle. Children under two are admitted for free.
source_phrases: This pass offers a 50% discount admission for up to two (2) adults and two (2) children in one vehicle. Children under two are admitted for free.

passes.title: Ecotarium
passes.benefit_text:
This pass admits up to two (2) adults at 50% discounted admission, and up to two (2) children at $1 admission.
Pickup the pass up to six (6) days in advance of the reservation date.
This pass MUST be returned to Acton Memorial Library before the library opens the day after use.  It can be placed in the outside book drop if the library is closed. Overdue passes are subject to a fine of $10 per day.
source_phrases: This pass admits up to two (2) adults at 50% discounted admission, and up to two (2) children at $1 admission.
Pickup the pass up to six (6) days in advance of the reservation date.

This pass MUST be returned to Acton Memorial Library before the library opens the day after use.  It can be placed in the outside book drop if the library is closed. Overdue passes are subject to a fine of $10 per day.

passes.title: Garden In The Woods Native Plant Trust
passes.benefit_text:
This pass allows four (4) people  at the Harvard Museum of Natural History or the Peabody admission desks at 50% off regular museum admission rates .
 Includes access to all four (4) HMSC museums.
source_phrases: This pass allows four (4) people  at the Harvard Museum of Natural History or the Peabody admission desks at 50% off regular museum admission rates .
Includes access to all four (4) HMSC museums.

passes.title: Harvard Museums Of Science And Culture
passes.benefit_text: Admits up to two (2) visitors at a discounted price of $10 per admission ticket. (discounted from the regular fee of $20 per ticket).
source_phrases: Admits up to two (2) visitors at a discounted price of $10 per admission ticket. (discounted from the regular fee of $20 per ticket).

passes.title: Institute Of Contemporary Art Boston
passes.benefit_text: This pass allows admission for up to four (4) people at $5 per person. Children under the age of 18 are always free.
source_phrases: This pass allows admission for up to four (4) people at $5 per person. Children under the age of 18 are always free.

passes.title: Isabella Stewart Gardner Museum
passes.benefit_text: Passes are no longer required—the presentation of a valid library card grants the cardholder 50% off of one admission ticket—but please place a reservation for the desired date of your visit.”
source_phrases: Passes are no longer required—the presentation of a valid library card grants the cardholder 50% off of one admission ticket—but please place a reservation for the desired date of your visit.”

passes.title: John F Kennedy Library And Museum
source_phrases: This pass admits 4 people to Drumlin Farm and other Mass Audubon wildlife sanctuaries for $2 per visitor over the age of 2.
This pass is a coupon and does not need to be returned to Acton Memorial Library.
This pass is provided by the Friends of the Acton Libraries.

passes.title: Mass Audubon Drumlin Farm
passes.benefit_text:
This pass offers free general parking at many Massachusetts State Parks.
Pickup the pass the day before or the day of the reservation date.
This pass is not valid for camping or parking at the following locations – Quabbin Reservoir Boat Launch Areas, Squantum Point, North Point, any metered facilities, or Draw Seven Commuter lots.
This pass MUST be returned to Acton Memorial Library before the library opens the day after use. It can be placed in the outside book drop if the library is closed. Overdue passes are subject to a fine of $10 per day.
source_phrases: This pass offers free general parking at many Massachusetts State Parks.
Pickup the pass the day before or the day of the reservation date.
This pass is not valid for camping or parking at the following locations – Quabbin Reservoir Boat Launch Areas, Squantum Point, North Point, any metered facilities, or Draw Seven Commuter lots.

This pass MUST be returned to Acton Memorial Library before the library opens the day after use. It can be placed in the outside book drop if the library is closed. Overdue passes are subject to a fine of $10 per day.

passes.title: Massachusetts State Parks Department Of Conservation And Recreation
passes.benefit_text:
This pass allows admission for two (2) adults at $15 each and up to 4 children ages 7-17 at $10 each. Children 6 and under are free.
The pass is good ONLY for the date listed. It cannot be used on another date.
source_phrases: This pass allows admission for two (2) adults at $15 each and up to 4 children ages 7-17 at $10 each. Children 6 and under are free.
The pass is good ONLY for the date listed. It cannot be used on another date.

passes.title: Museum Of Fine Arts
passes.benefit_text:
• This pass will admit up to 4 people at a 50% discount on tickets to the Museum’s Exhibit Halls. Children under 3 are not included in the count of 4 and are always admitted for free.
• Your Library pass can only be used on the date printed on the pass.
• Please bring your library pass confirmation (printed or displayed on a phone) when you visit.
• When you arrive at the Museum, stop at the Box Office to exchange your library pass and purchase your Exhibit Halls tickets at the discounted rate. If you have any questions or if you would like to reserve your Exhibit Halls passes in advance to avoid waiting in line the day of your visit, please call 617-723-2500 (9:00 a.m. – 5:00 p.m. daily).
• If you are unable to show your Library confirmation on a phone, you may print out a copy using the link in the confirmation email or request a paper copy from the library.
source_phrases: • This pass will admit up to 4 people at a 50% discount on tickets to the Museum’s Exhibit Halls. Children under 3 are not included in the count of 4 and are always admitted for free.
• Your Library pass can only be used on the date printed on the pass.
• Please bring your library pass confirmation (printed or displayed on a phone) when you visit.

• When you arrive at the Museum, stop at the Box Office to exchange your library pass and purchase your Exhibit Halls tickets at the discounted rate. If you have any questions or if you would like to reserve your Exhibit Halls passes in advance to avoid waiting in line the day of your visit, please call 617-723-2500 (9:00 a.m. – 5:00 p.m. daily).
• If you are unable to show your Library confirmation on a phone, you may print out a copy using the link in the confirmation email or request a paper copy from the library.

passes.title: New England Aquarium
passes.benefit_text:
This pass offers a 50% discount on general admission for up to two (2) people.
Pickup the pass the day before or the day of the reservation date.
source_phrases: This pass offers a 50% discount on general admission for up to two (2) people.
Pickup the pass the day before or the day of the reservation date.

passes.title: New England Botanic Garden At Tower Hill
passes.benefit_text: The Peabody Essex Museum pass offers discounted tickets of $12 each for up to two (2) people.
source_phrases: The Peabody Essex Museum pass offers discounted tickets of $12 each for up to two (2) people.

passes.title: The Trustees Of The Reservations
passes.benefit_text: Provides discounted admission for a group of up to 6 individuals per pass to the Franklin Park and Stone Zoos. Admission costs with the pass are $9 per adult and $6 per child. Under 2 is free. Pass can only be used for daytime admission. They can't be used for Stone Zoo Zoolights or Franklin Park Zoo Boston Lights.
source_phrases: Provides discounted admission for a group of up to 6 individuals per pass to the Franklin Park and Stone Zoos. Admission costs with the pass are $9 per adult and $6 per child. Under 2 is free. Pass can only be used for daytime admission. They can't be used for Stone Zoo Zoolights or Franklin Park Zoo Boston Lights.
